description_long: This is a rustic wooden cabin with a prominent, dark gabled roof and natural log exterior walls. The structure features a central main section with two perpendicular wings, creating a T-shaped footprint. The roof is steeply pitched with deep overhangs, and a stone chimney is visible on one side. Large windows are symmetrically arranged on the front and sides, allowing ample natural light inside. A covered porch extends from one end, supported by wooden posts and featuring a simple railing. The foundation appears to be made of stone, adding to the sturdy, traditional appearance.
description: A rustic wooden cabin with a dark gabled roof, stone foundation, and a covered porch, featuring large windows and a central chimney.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, covered porch, and the central gabled roof with visible stone chimney.
description_view_1: Side angle highlighting the porch, two large front windows, and the intersecting rooflines.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back wall with a large window and the full width of the cabin's wings.
description_view_3: Opposite end view showing the secondary entrance or porch area and the extended roof overhang.
attribute_roof_type: gable roof with intersecting perpendicular gables, deep overhangs, and dark shingle or metal covering
attribute_window_arrangement: Multiple large rectangular windows symmetrically placed on the front and sides, with paired windows on the front facade and single large windows on the sides
attribute_door_placement: Single main door centered on the front facade beneath the porch, with a possible secondary entrance on the side porch
